news.title:
ICICI Prudential Life reports Feb '26 performance; YoY growth in RWRP at 7.7%, APE at 12.3%, NB premium at 15.7%.
NB sum assured grew 31.5% YoY in Feb '26; company updates hosted on its website as per SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
ICICI Prudential Life reports Feb '26 performance; YoY growth in RWRP at 7.7%, APE at 12.3%, NB premium at 15.7%.
NB sum assured grew 31.5% YoY in Feb '26; company updates hosted on its website as per SEBI regulations.

news.title:
Gold, silver ETFs fell up to 7.4% despite global price recovery; ICICI Prudential Silver ETF dropped 7.3%.
Domestic bullion ETF fall mirrors global correction amid stronger USD; gold prices in India dropped Rs 2,800-2,900.
news.summary:
Gold, silver ETFs fell up to 7.4% despite global price recovery; ICICI Prudential Silver ETF dropped 7.3%.
Domestic bullion ETF fall mirrors global correction amid stronger USD; gold prices in India dropped Rs 2,800-2,900.

news.title:
ICICI Prudential Life faces a tax demand of ₹2.16 billion.
This tax liability may impact the company's financials.
news.summary:
ICICI Prudential Life faces a tax demand of ₹2.16 billion.
This tax liability may impact the company's financials.

news.title:
ICICI Prudential Life received a partial favorable order from Maharashtra Joint Commissioner of State Tax for FY2018.
The GST demand totals ₹216.4 crore, including tax, interest, and penalty; the company plans to appeal the decision.
news.summary:
ICICI Prudential Life received a partial favorable order from Maharashtra Joint Commissioner of State Tax for FY2018.
The GST demand totals ₹216.4 crore, including tax, interest, and penalty; the company plans to appeal the decision.

news.title:
Flexicap, hybrid funds boost India's ₹1-trillion MF club with three schemes crossing ₹1 trillion AUM since May 2025.
Prominent MF categories witness rising traction, contributing to the surge in mega mutual fund schemes.
news.summary:
Flexicap, hybrid funds boost India's ₹1-trillion MF club with three schemes crossing ₹1 trillion AUM since May 2025.
Prominent MF categories witness rising traction, contributing to the surge in mega mutual fund schemes.

news.title:
RBI's stricter norms on bundling insurance with loans may impact high-margin credit protect sales, pressuring VNB margins for insurers.
HDFC Life and ICICI Prudential face higher exposure risks, while SBI Life and Max Life are relatively insulated; banks may see modest fee income impact.
news.summary:
RBI's stricter norms on bundling insurance with loans may impact high-margin credit protect sales, pressuring VNB margins for insurers.
HDFC Life and ICICI Prudential face higher exposure risks, while SBI Life and Max Life are relatively insulated; banks may see modest fee income impact.

news.title:
RBI approves ICICI Prudential to acquire up to 9.95% stake in IDFC First Bank.
The approval includes entities within the ICICI Prudential group for the stake acquisition.
news.summary:
RBI approves ICICI Prudential to acquire up to 9.95% stake in IDFC First Bank.
The approval includes entities within the ICICI Prudential group for the stake acquisition.

news.title:
ICICI Prudential reported FY 2025 RWRP at 83.07B, a 15.2% YoY growth.
Jan 2026 RWRP grew 8.7% YoY to 7.84B; NB premiums rose 24.9% YoY in FY 2025.
news.summary:
ICICI Prudential reported FY 2025 RWRP at 83.07B, a 15.2% YoY growth.
Jan 2026 RWRP grew 8.7% YoY to 7.84B; NB premiums rose 24.9% YoY in FY 2025.

news.title:
Life insurers reported increased demand for ULIPs in Q3FY26 due to strong equity market performance.
ICICI Prudential, HDFC Life, and LIC likely benefited from this trend in the October-December FY26 period.
news.summary:
Life insurers reported increased demand for ULIPs in Q3FY26 due to strong equity market performance.
ICICI Prudential, HDFC Life, and LIC likely benefited from this trend in the October-December FY26 period.

news.title:
ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund reopens subscriptions for its small cap fund.
The fund was paused in March 2024 after SEBI's directive to AMFI.
news.summary:
ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund reopens subscriptions for its small cap fund.
The fund was paused in March 2024 after SEBI's directive to AMFI.

news.title:
ICICI Prudential Life's Q3 retail APE grew 9.9% YoY, with retail protection up 40.8%.
VNB reached ₹6.15B with a 24.4% margin; cost-to-premium ratio fell to 19.3%, solvency at 214.8%.
news.summary:
ICICI Prudential Life's Q3 retail APE grew 9.9% YoY, with retail protection up 40.8%.
VNB reached ₹6.15B with a 24.4% margin; cost-to-premium ratio fell to 19.3%, solvency at 214.8%.

news.title:
New Labour Codes of Nov 2025 increased employee costs for private banks, insurers.
Higher operating expenses reported in Q3FY26 due to statutory impact of these codes.
news.summary:
New Labour Codes of Nov 2025 increased employee costs for private banks, insurers.
Higher operating expenses reported in Q3FY26 due to statutory impact of these codes.

news.title:
ICICI Prudential Life expects annuity business recovery as conditions stabilize.
The company foresees long-term growth in group term business with focus on risk-reward goals.
news.summary:
ICICI Prudential Life expects annuity business recovery as conditions stabilize.
The company foresees long-term growth in group term business with focus on risk-reward goals.

news.title:
Goldman Sachs maintains Neutral rating on ICICI Prudential Life.
The rating reflects limited upside potential for the stock.
news.summary:
Goldman Sachs maintains Neutral rating on ICICI Prudential Life.
The rating reflects limited upside potential for the stock.

news.title: ICICI Prudential shares fell 4% post-Q3 results.
news.summary: ICICI Prudential shares fell 4% post-Q3 results.

news.title:
ICICI Prudential's Q3 results show a 4% rise in total APE to ₹2,525 crore.
VNB increased 19% to ₹615 crore, with VNB margin improving to 24.4% YoY.
news.summary:
ICICI Prudential's Q3 results show a 4% rise in total APE to ₹2,525 crore.
VNB increased 19% to ₹615 crore, with VNB margin improving to 24.4% YoY.

news.title:
ICICI Prudential's board approved Q3 and 9-month unaudited results ending Dec 31, 2025.
No deviation in NCD proceeds usage; disclosures authorized by key managerial personnel.
news.summary:
ICICI Prudential's board approved Q3 and 9-month unaudited results ending Dec 31, 2025.
No deviation in NCD proceeds usage; disclosures authorized by key managerial personnel.

news.title: ICICI Prudential Life's Q3 net profit rose to 3.9B rupees from 3.26B YoY.
news.summary: ICICI Prudential Life's Q3 net profit rose to 3.9B rupees from 3.26B YoY.

news.title:
ICICI Lombard, ICICI Prudential, Tata Elxsi, and Bank of Maharashtra to report Q3 results.
NDTV Profit provides live updates on December quarter performance and latest business news.
news.summary:

news.title:
ICICI Pru Life Q3FY26 sees VNB margin expansion due to product mix.
Premium growth was muted, impacted by high base and weak group business.
news.summary:
ICICI Pru Life Q3FY26 sees VNB margin expansion due to product mix.
